raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Start from here","name":"Before we get into specifics, what feels most important to talk through today, Maria?","description":"Safe opener that lets Maria set the agenda and reveal what is most live for her now.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Current footing","name":"What feels most solid in your role right now?","description":"Surfaces the parts of her current Principal work that are working well enough to build from.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next chapter","name":"What kind of impact do you want your next chapter to have?","description":"Gets beyond title-chasing toward the kind of contribution she wants to be known for.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Role horizon","name":"What scope do you want your work to have over the next year?","description":"Clarifies the scale and shape of the work she is aiming toward.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Readout needed","name":"What do you still want a clearer readout on from last cycle?","description":"Opens the unanswered-question thread without assuming she wants to revisit it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Gap to close","name":"What feels like the biggest gap between your current work and the next step you want?","description":"Surfaces the specific difference between her present scope and the future scope she wants.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What would make the mentoring program feel like real growth work for you?","description":"Tests whether mentoring is strategically advancing her trajectory or just filling time.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager leverage","name":"What would you want more of from me to make your next step feel more concrete?","description":"Finds the specific kind of manager support that would turn ambition into an executable plan.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Commit next move","name":"What is the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?","description":"Closes on a specific action or decision she is committing to before the next 1:1.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
